nodes.name: simd.rs
nodes.summary: Scalar, AVX2 SIMD, and Rayon-parallel kernels for applying single- and two-qubit gates to the state vector; auto-selects the best implementation.

nodes.name: simulator.rs
nodes.summary: High-level state-vector Simulator that runs a QuantumCircuit, applies noise, and returns SimulationResult with shot statistics.

nodes.name: stabilizer.rs
nodes.summary: Tableau-based stabilizer simulator enabling polynomial-time simulation of arbitrary-size Clifford circuits.

nodes.name: state.rs
nodes.summary: QuantumState: dense state-vector representation with gate application, measurement, reset, fidelity, and expectation utilities.

nodes.name: subpoly_decoder.rs
nodes.summary: Sub-polynomial surface-code decoders: hierarchical tiled, renormalization, and sliding-window variants with complexity-bound analysis.

nodes.name: tensor_network.rs
nodes.summary: Matrix-Product State (MPS) tensor-network simulator with truncatable bond dimension for low-entanglement circuits.

nodes.name: transpiler.rs
nodes.summary: Hardware transpiler: decomposes circuits to IBM/Rigetti/IonQ basis gate sets, routes against coupling maps, and applies optimization passes.

nodes.name: types.rs
nodes.summary: Foundational types: Complex number with full operator overloads, PauliOp, PauliString, Hamiltonian, MeasurementOutcome, NoiseModel.

nodes.name: verification.rs
nodes.summary: Cross-backend verification: stabilizer-vs-state-vector consistency checks, TVD, Chi-squared statistic, and discrepancy reporting.

nodes.name: witness.rs
nodes.summary: WitnessLog cryptographic chain of execution records with deterministic hashing for verifiable quantum computation.

nodes.name: test_gates.rs
nodes.summary: Tests of gate matrix correctness, unitarity, and self-inverse properties across all single- and two-qubit gates.

nodes.name: test_simulator.rs
nodes.summary: Simulator integration tests: Bell states, GHZ, depth analysis, seeded reproducibility, shot statistics, and memory estimates.

nodes.name: test_state.rs
nodes.summary: Exhaustive QuantumState tests: superposition, entanglement, measurement statistics, Hamiltonian expectation, teleportation, superdense coding.

nodes.name: test_types.rs
nodes.summary: Tests for Complex arithmetic, PauliString operations, and Hamiltonian construction.

nodes.name: ADR-001-ruqu-architecture.md
nodes.summary: Architecture Decision Record establishing the ruQu hierarchical-mesh architecture for coherence-gate decisions.

nodes.name: DDD-001-coherence-gate-domain.md
nodes.summary: Domain-Driven Design document for the coherence-gate bounded context.

nodes.name: DDD-002-syndrome-processing-domain.md
nodes.summary: DDD document defining the syndrome-processing bounded context: ingestion, filtering, decoding.

nodes.name: RESEARCH_DISCOVERIES.md
nodes.summary: Catalog of research discoveries (coherence-gate breakthroughs, sub-polynomial decoder results) underpinning ruQu.

nodes.name: SECURITY-REVIEW.md
nodes.summary: Security review covering constant-time ops, key management, and witness-chain integrity for ruQu.

nodes.name: SIMULATION-INTEGRATION.md
nodes.summary: Integration guide describing how ruQu plugs into ruqu-core simulation harnesses.

nodes.name: coherence_gate_breakthrough.rs
nodes.summary: Demonstrator showing the coherence-gate decision result across code distances and error rates, with comparative benchmarking.

nodes.name: coherence_simulation.rs
nodes.summary: Example syndrome-generation simulation feeding the ruQu coherence engine, with detector bitmap throughput benchmark.

nodes.name: apply_single_qubit_gate_scalar
nodes.summary: Scalar (no-SIMD) kernel applying a 2x2 unitary to a target qubit.

nodes.name: apply_single_qubit_gate_simd
nodes.summary: AVX2-accelerated single-qubit gate kernel; unsafe, requires CPU SIMD support.

nodes.name: apply_single_qubit_gate_parallel
nodes.summary: Rayon-parallel single-qubit gate kernel splitting amplitude pairs across worker threads.

nodes.name: apply_single_qubit_gate_best
nodes.summary: Dispatch wrapper that picks SIMD/parallel/scalar at runtime based on features and state size.

nodes.name: Simulator
nodes.summary: Top-level state-vector Simulator with run/shots/measure_all entry points and noise injection.

nodes.name: SimConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration knobs for the simulator (shots, seed, parallelism, mixed precision, noise).

nodes.name: StabilizerState
nodes.summary: Tableau-based stabilizer state supporting polynomial-time simulation of Clifford circuits.

nodes.name: QuantumState
nodes.summary: Dense state-vector with full gate-application, measurement, expectation, and fidelity APIs.

nodes.name: HierarchicalTiledDecoder
nodes.summary: Hierarchical tiled decoder achieving sub-polynomial scaling for surface-code syndromes.

nodes.name: RenormalizationDecoder
nodes.summary: Decoder that iteratively renormalizes the defect graph to coarser scales for sub-poly cost.

nodes.name: SlidingWindowDecoder
nodes.summary: Sliding-window decoder amortising syndrome decoding across rounds with bounded lookback.

nodes.name: verify_subpolynomial
nodes.summary: Empirically checks that scaling data points fit a sub-polynomial complexity curve.

nodes.name: MpsState
nodes.summary: Matrix-Product State simulator with configurable max bond dimension and truncation cutoff.

nodes.name: transpile
nodes.summary: Top-level transpile pipeline: basis decomposition, routing, and optimization at a chosen level.

nodes.name: route_circuit
nodes.summary: Couples a logical circuit onto a hardware coupling map by inserting SWAPs along BFS shortest paths.

nodes.name: optimize_gates
nodes.summary: Optimisation pass cancelling inverse pairs and merging adjacent RZ gates.

nodes.name: Complex
nodes.summary: Double-precision complex number with full arithmetic, polar conversion, and conjugate utilities.

nodes.name: PauliOp
nodes.summary: Single-qubit Pauli operator I/X/Y/Z used as building block for PauliString and Hamiltonian.

nodes.name: Hamiltonian
nodes.summary: Weighted sum of PauliString terms representing a quantum observable or generator.

nodes.name: verify_circuit
nodes.summary: Verifies a circuit by comparing stabilizer and state-vector backends with statistical tests.

nodes.name: WitnessLog
nodes.summary: Append-only hash-chained log of WitnessEntry records for verifiable quantum execution.
